task_completion.description: Create a new ground station for Denver, CO with the specified parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station configuration window showing 'Denver' with Latitude 39.7392, Longitude 104.9903 W (or -104.9903), Altitude 1609, and Weather Station KDEN.

task_completion.description: Set the Denver ground station as the default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Preferences -> Ground Stations window, Denver is selected as the default ground station.

task_completion.description: Delete the existing Amateur module entirely.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' tab is no longer visible in the main GPredict window.

task_completion.description: Create a new module called DenverAmateur containing ISS, AO-7, SO-50, AO-85, and AO-91.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab named 'DenverAmateur' is visible, and its satellite list (either in the module configuration window or the main interface) includes ISS, AO-7, SO-50, AO-85, and AO-91.

task_completion.description: Create a new module called DenverWX containing NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab named 'DenverWX' is visible, and its satellite list (either in the module configuration window or the main interface) includes NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19.

task_completion.description: Configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Edit -> Preferences -> General -> Number and Date Formats, the 'Use UTC instead of local time' option is checked, or the main window clock explicitly displays 'UTC'.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Edit Ground Station, Configure Module) being used to make the changes.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor or terminal to manually edit the configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or text editor windows are open editing files in the ~/.config/Gpredict directory.

integrity.description: The newly created modules appear as functional tabs in the GPredict main window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The DenverAmateur and DenverWX tabs are visible and rendering actual satellite data/maps in the GPredict interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Denver ground station parameters: Latitude 39.7392, Longitude -104.9903 (or 104.9903 W), Altitude 1609, Weather Station KDEN. DenverAmateur satellites: ISS (25544), AO-7 (7530), SO-50 (27607), AO-85 (40967), AO-91 (43017). DenverWX satellites: NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591).
